name: Amazon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease a 9 x 13-inch (23 cm x 33 cm) pan with shortening. Place foil on the countertop for cooling cookies.
2. Combine shortening, brown sugar, milk, and vanilla in a large bowl. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Beat egg into creamed mixture.
3. Combine flour, salt, and baking soda. Mix into creamed mixture just until blended. Stir in chocolate chips and pecans.
4. Spread into prepared pan using a long metal spatula.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 325°F (160°C). Bake for an additional 5 minutes. Do not overbake. Cool for 2 minutes in the pan. Cut into 16 bars.
